name: Third Person Controller
agentBrief: A polished third-person shooter controller demo in the Ratchet-and-Clank mold (Godot 4.6, Forward+, GDScript). ENTRY SCENE: res://main.tscn (playground.tscn is the level content it wraps; demo_page/ is a demo-chrome overlay you can strip when turning this into a real game). PLAYER (player/): player.gd on player.tscn — run, jump, melee attack, aim, shoot projectile bullets (player/bullet.tscn, physical projectiles, not hitscan) and lob grenades via grenade_launcher.gd with a trajectory preview (grenade_visuals/trajectory_mockup.tscn); weapon cycling on swap_weapons with UI icons in icons/. character_skin.gd drives the animated robot character. Coins (player/coin/) fly to the player when collected. CAMERA (player/camera_controller.gd) — THE MATH HERE IS A DELIBERATE FIX, DO NOT REGRESS IT: mouse input converts pixels straight to radians (mouse_sensitivity, default 0.002 rad/px) and is NEVER multiplied by frame delta — multiplying mouse deltas by delta made sensitivity scale with FPS (2.4x faster at 60fps than 144fps). Joystick input IS a rate, so it alone is scaled by joystick_sensitivity (rad/s, default 1.0) * delta. Mouse events accumulate with += and setup() zeroes the accumulators so nothing pre-spawn can jerk the camera. The camera runs a SpringArm3D third-person pivot plus an over-shoulder pivot for aiming, with a raycast supplying the aim target. INPUT ACTION NAMES ARE NONSTANDARD: move_up/move_down/move_left/move_right (NOT move_forward/move_back), plus jump, attack (shoot), aim, swap_weapons, pause, camera_left/right/up/down — all bound in project.godot for keyboard/mouse and gamepad. AUTOLOADS (2): CameraMode — a DEBUG-BUILD-ONLY F10 photo/fly camera that pauses the tree; it is inert in release exports, leave it alone — and FullScreenHandler. ENEMIES (enemies/): bee_bot (flying, fires bullets) and beetle_bot (ground charger), each with a skin scene, dying into smoke_puff. WORLD: breakable crates (box/ -> destroyed_box), jumping_pad/ with its own visuals, level/death_plane.gd for fall-out, environment/ with trees, bushes, flower patches and grass chunks scattered by grass_scatter.gd. LICENSING: code MIT (Summer Engine); ART IS CC-BY 4.0 GDQUEST — attribution required, and the shipped LICENSE file contains the exact credit lines; keep that file in derived games and carry the credit into their credits screen. CUSTOMIZE BY: reskinning the character via character_skin, retuning player and camera @exports, building levels from the crates/pads/enemies as plug-and-play pieces, stripping demo_page/ for a clean base — do not rewrite the controller/camera spine, and do not reintroduce delta scaling on mouse look.

userFacing.tagline: A polished third-person controller: run, jump, melee, aim, shoot and lob grenades — with enemies to use it on.
highlights: Complete third-person character: run, jump, melee, over-shoulder aiming, projectile shooting and grenades with a trajectory preview
Frame-rate independent camera with tuned mouse and gamepad sensitivity
Flying and ground enemies with animated skins and death effects
Breakable crates, jump pads and coins that fly to the player
A dressed environment with trees, grass scattering and flower patches
Full keyboard/mouse and gamepad bindings, plus an F10 photo mode in debug builds
